S.FORM: Nate Bowman sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA. kawas tay 1943, ryax sa tay 19 nqu tay 3, Nate Bowman, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 1984) cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: nate Œ≤owman s~…ïraral ƒßja î…£a s~…ïis~…ïjuw na nŒ≤a. kawas~…ï taj ****, rjax s~…ïa taj ** nqu taj *, nate Œ≤owman, s~…ïquliq na p îunro. (mƒßuqil s~…ïa kawas~…ï taj ****) ¶~ ®inkƒßulan s~…ïa knita î s~…ïa Œ≤rŒ≤iru î lis~…ïts~…ï o* national Œ≤as~…ïketŒ≤all as~…ïs~…ïo ¶~ ®iation plajers~…ï
